name: The Dark
collationMethod: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet (C3/C1) + uncommon sheet (U2 uncommons / U1 rares)

draft.notes: 8-card booster: 6 from the common sheet, 2 from the uncommon sheet (no dedicated rare slot — both 'uncommon' and 'rare' cards share the uncommon sheet). Cards back-facing, uncommon-common ordering. Pre-foil era.

statedRates: rares are the U1 (single-print) cards on the uncommon sheet; uncommons are U2 (double-print); the lone C1 card (Maze of Ith) sits between C3 commons and U2 uncommons
sourceNotes: Small set, 119 cards. Page states 40 commons (C3) + 1 C1 (Maze of Ith) = 41 commons recorded; 43 uncommons (U2); 35 rares (U1). Only two physical sheets exist. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
